San Antonio will have periods of rain and drizzle today. Roads may be slick, so give yourself extra time and drive carefully.

byCNN Newsource

WNBA star Brittney Griner will have another fan cheering for her as she competes in the summer Olympics in Paris-- her son!

Griner and her wife Cherelle welcomed their little bundle of joy on July 8th.

The Phoenix Mercury star player revealed the joyous news Friday on the "She Knows Sports" podcast" -- where she said -- quote -- "that's my man."

She also said that her whole phone had turned into him.

The couple first revealed they were expecting their first child on social media in April.

Before heading to Paris in the coming week Griner will play for Team USA in Saturday's WNBA all-star game.

The star was released on December 20-22 from detainment in Russia, after being sentenced for drug smuggling.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Brittney Griner welcomes new son ahead of Olympics and WNBA All-Star game
description: WNBA star Brittney Griner will have another fan cheering for her as she competes in the summer Olympics in Paris-- her son!Griner and her wife Cherelle welcomed
